text: Why can't we use magnetism as an "action at a distance" force? I don't have a very good science background, but I know that magnetic forces are based on a field. Why is it not possible to use electromagnets to create some kind of interference with the field in such a way that produces some kind of an action at a distance?

Questioning gender/sexuality. Discovering who I am after years of repression and bullying. Im both extremely shameful of my masculinity because I know I don’t think and feel masculine enough or traditionally male; and extremely guilty of my femininity because I’ve always valued feminine personality traits more then masculine and I’ve been told many times that’s wrong.

As a reaction to this I have always tried to be perceived as masculine/straight for the sake of being “normal,” so I wouldn’t get bullied. 

I’ve also been trying to cover up the feminine personality traits so everything lines up with what I’m expected to be so I also wouldn’t get bullied. 

It was like a survival mechanism. If I ever noticed an ounce of femininity or not straightness I would go into a depressive anxious episode for days until I repressed the initial feeling or found a way to rationalize it with the straight male narrative.

Same with if I found myself to not be as masculine/“normal” as my Peers, I would go into a depressive episode until I bullied myself into repressing everything and doing something to become more masculine.

To sum this up I’ve repressed myself so much I haven’t had time or energy as a kid/teenager to go through the process of finding out what gender/sexuality I am. 

Who can connect with this? Because I feel so disassociated with who I am I don’t know who I am. Thinking about who I am or might be fills me with shame guilt and fear. Who can relate? Who has found solutions to similar problems? Thank you.
I don't want to do this anymore Why couldn't I have been born a man, I'm don't want to be like this. I don't want this.
